title: olearia stuartii
intro: Olearia stuartii, also known as Stuart's tree daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Australian mainland and is part of the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia stuartii are said to include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions in hot water.
